original_snippet_context: Discussion of Alves Lima's business activities and his promotion of "Café Paulista."
relevant_quote: Elle chegou a Buenos Aires com quatro ou cinco saccas do Café Paulista.
justification: This mention of "Café Paulista" refers to the product itself and Alves Lima's business, with no discussion of monetary policy related to the Caixa de Conversão. Therefore, it is purely factual in this context.
